scripts.test: APP_ENV=test AI_PROVIDER=mock AI_ENABLED=false DATABASE_PATH=.tmp/test.sqlite vitest run
scripts.test:e2e: rm -rf .tmp/e2e-app-data .tmp/e2e.sqlite .tmp/e2e.sqlite-shm .tmp/e2e.sqlite-wal && APP_ENV=test AI_PROVIDER=mock AI_ENABLED=false DATA_DIR=.tmp/e2e-app-data DATABASE_PATH=.tmp/e2e.sqlite playwright test
scripts.release:check: APP_ENV=local-prod npm run doctor && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run eval:fixtures && npm run build && CI=1 npm run test:e2e
scripts.smoke:openai: APP_ENV=test AI_PROVIDER=openai AI_ENABLED=true DATABASE_PATH=.tmp/openai-smoke.sqlite tsx scripts/smoke-openai.ts
scripts.eval:fixtures: APP_ENV=test AI_PROVIDER=mock AI_ENABLED=false DATABASE_PATH=.tmp/eval.sqlite vitest run tests/evals/fixture-evals.test.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
